Metad Reports

Current results for all of the MetaD simluations that are running on Topaz. Most upd to date information pulled at the specified report generation time.

Brady Johnston

Report Auto-generated: 23 August, 2020

RNA Simulations.

The RNA sequences are shown below, with the primary target of dPPR10 being BAJ_01. Mismatches to this primary target sequence are highlighted in red, and truncations of the sequence are represented by dashes ---.

Name Sequence
BAJ_01 UGUAUCCUUAACCAUUUCU
BAJ_02 UCACAGGAACCGGCAAAGU
BAJ_03 UGUAUCCUAAACCAUUUCU
BAJ_04 UGUAUCCUUUACCAUUUCU
BAJ_05 UGUAUCCUAUACCAUUUCU
BAJ_06 UGUAUCCUUAACCAAUUCU
BAJ_07 UGUAUCCUUAACCUUUUCU
BAJ_08 UGUAUCCUUAACCUAUUCU
BAJ_12 -----------CCAUUUCU
BAJ_13 UGUAUCCUUAA--------

MetaD Sim Space

ggplot(df, aes(x = path.sss, 
               y = path.zzz, 
               colour = time/1000)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.02, size = 0.1) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c() +
  geom_richtext(data = rna_seq %>% 
                  filter(!name %in% c("BAJ_09", "BAJ_10", "BAJ_11", "noRNA")), 
                mapping = aes(label=seq, x = 5.5, y = 2.5), colour = "gray10", family="mono", size = 3, vjust=1) +
  facet_wrap(~name, ncol = 3) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10, limits = c(1,10)) +
  simpleThemes::simple_light() +
  labs(colour = "Time (ns)", 
       title = "MetaD Simulation Space")  + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal")

MetaD Density

ggplot(df, aes(x = path.sss, 
               y = path.zzz, 
               colour = time/1000)) + 
  # geom_point(alpha = 0.2, size = 0.1) +
  geom_density_2d_filled(contour_var = "ndensity", bins = 20) + 
  geom_richtext(data = rna_seq %>% 
                  filter(!name %in% c("BAJ_09", "BAJ_10", "BAJ_11", "noRNA")), 
                mapping = aes(label=seq, x = 5.5, y = 2.4), colour = "gray10", family="mono", size = 3, vjust=1) +
  scale_colour_viridis_c() +
  facet_wrap(~name, ncol = 3) + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light(legend = F) + 
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 1:10, expand = c(0,0), limits = c(1,10)) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = c(0,1,2), expand = c(0,0)) +
  labs(colour = "Time (ns)", 
       title = "MetaD Simulation Space")

MetaD RMSD

Vertical black line indicates 500 ns, initial time that was set for all simulations.

df %>% 
  select(time, name, rmsd0, rmsd1) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(rmsd0, rmsd1), 
               names_prefix = "rmsd", 
               names_to = "Model"
               ) %>% 

ggplot(aes(x = time/1000, 
               y = value, 
               colour = Model)) + 
  geom_line() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=500), colour = "black", alpha=0.9) +
  simpleThemes::simple_light() +
  geom_richtext(data = rna_seq %>% 
                  filter(!name %in% c("BAJ_09", "BAJ_10", "BAJ_11", "noRNA")), 
                mapping = aes(label=seq, x = 250, y = 8), colour = "gray10", family="mono", size = 3, vjust=1) +
  facet_wrap(~name, ncol = 3) +
  labs(x = "Time (ns)", 
       y = "RMSD", 
       title = "RMSD for simulations.") + 
  theme(legend.position = "bottom", 
        legend.direction = "horizontal")

MetaD Hills

Data

hfl = list.files(pattern = "HILLS", recursive = T, full.names = T)
read.HILLS <- function(x){
  tempdf = read.table(x)
  colnames(tempdf) = c("time", "path.sss", "path.zzz", "sigma_path.sss", "sigma_path.zzz", "height", "biasf")
  tempdf$name = str_trunc(str_trunc(x, ellipsis = "", width = 8),6, side = "left", ellipsis = "")
  return(as.data.frame(tempdf))
}


hdf = lapply(hfl, read.HILLS)

df2 = do.call("rbind", hdf)

head(df2)
##   time path.sss    path.zzz sigma_path.sss sigma_path.zzz    height biasf
## 1    1 9.712674 -0.02470489            0.3           0.08 1.0714286    15
## 2    2 9.715892 -0.02334434            0.3           0.08 1.0404769    15
## 3    3 9.707418 -0.02340117            0.3           0.08 1.0112824    15
## 4    4 9.707432 -0.02218700            0.3           0.08 0.9836960    15
## 5    5 9.704295 -0.02288914            0.3           0.08 0.9575767    15
## 6    6 9.696488 -0.02249420            0.3           0.08 0.9329187    15
##     name
## 1 BAJ_01
## 2 BAJ_01
## 3 BAJ_01
## 4 BAJ_01
## 5 BAJ_01
## 6 BAJ_01

Plot

ggplot(df2, aes(time/1e3, height)) + 
  geom_line() +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept=500), colour = "black", alpha=0.9) + 
  scale_y_continuous() + 
  simpleThemes::simple_light() + 
  geom_richtext(data = rna_seq %>% 
                  filter(!name %in% c("BAJ_09", "BAJ_10", "BAJ_11", "noRNA")), 
                mapping = aes(label=seq, x = 300, y = 1), colour = "gray10", family="mono", size = 3, vjust=1) +
  labs(x = "Time (ns)", 
       y = "Height",
       title = "Height over Time") + 
  facet_wrap(~name, ncol = 3)
